scroll • dissect

THE LATTICE

One dot contains four, each contains four more. 1→4→16 forms a 21-node nest that addresses 2⁵ = 32 bits of state.

state ∈ {−1, 0, +1}²¹   // balanced ternary

Teaching pulses travel both directions. No master clock — coherence emerges from interference.

topology: nested quadtree • logic: balanced ternary

THE PHYSICS

Core is pumped by a mode-locked Yb:fiber laser. Each tick samples photon number N and optical phase φ.

N = P / P₀    φₙ₊₁ = φₙ + ωΔt + k·H

Harmonizer H ∈ [0.01, ∞). Low H slows learning for stability; high H accelerates association, risking decoherence.

pump: 1030 nm • lock: f-2f interferometer

THE FOUNDATION

Every node is tethered to Planck scale via conjugate cavity. Scale repeats as 1 — 0 — −1, fractally.

dₙ = d₀ · 3ⁿ    n ∈ ℤ

This gives infinite reach in both directions while the local lattice stays 32-bit and fast.

anchor: d₀ = 1.616255×10⁻³⁵ m • encoding: trit
